question: Find the biographical data and event date for students who participated in any events.
sql: SELECT Students.student_id, Students.bio_data, Student_Events.event_date FROM Students JOIN Student_Events ON Students.student_id = Student_Events.student_id;

back_translation.intent: 查询学生及其相关事件信息

semantic.reason: 过滤条件不一致。原始问题要求所有参与活动的学生，但SQL描述中错误地限定了Students.student_id IN (123, 456, 789)。
